title: Enchant Golden Apple
description: Golden apples can be enchanted as enchanted golden apples
body:
这是一个简单的模组，提供了附魔金苹果的获取方式：玩家可以让金苹果在附魔台被附魔为附魔金苹果，但要消耗500经验。

This is a simple mod that provides a way to obtain enchanted golden apples: players can enchant golden apples at the enchanting table to turn them into enchanted golden apples, but it will cost 500 experience points.
